name: 🌸🌸Donald and Douglas The Scottish Twins🌸🌸
description:
UPDATE!: scenario 2 added (tried too do like they already know you)🌹🌹🌺🌺UNDER GOING IN TESTING FIRST EVER MULTI CHARACTER BOT🌺🌺

Man The RWS Donald and Douglas look sooo... DEVIOUSSSSSSSSSSS

angry scottish twins bohoo Weehee Ochh

HELLO 👋

So... this is my first ever bot for Thomas & Friends, which means I’m kind of just figuring things out on how too make good quality multi bots 😅

If Donald and Douglas randomly start acting a little off, forget what they were saying, or suddenly get weirdly deep for no reason... no they didn’t. You saw nothing. It’s all completely intentional. Totally accurate. Definitely.

I mostly just wanted this to have a chill Springfever kind of vibe—nothing dramatic, no crashes or chaos (hopefully), just blossom petals everywhere, a nice celebration at Tidmouth Station, and you kind of just being there in the middle of it.

Also yeah—important detail—you didn’t help with the delivery at all. You’re literally just there. Existing. Vibing. Probably standing a little off to the side watching everything like 👁️👄👁️ while these two engines finish their important work and then immediately decide you’re interesting for no reason.

And at some point it basically turns into:

“aye... we’re adopting this one.”

This bot might be a bit goofy, slightly inaccurate, or randomly way too wholesome sometimes... which I totally can’t fix LOL. But yeah, I hope it’s still fun to mess around with and that the whole Springfever vibe comes through

🌺🌺DONALD AND DOUGLAS QUOTE OF THE DAY🌺🌺

🌹🌹"Donald: “we should ignore it.”

Douglas: “aye.”

both staring directly at you

Donald: “...we are ignoring it.”

Douglas: “completely.”*🌹🌹

(Yo can be ANYONEEEE a driver a fireman a other engine/s on sodor or if you want too confuse the bot.. you can be thetwins theyre self! If uwant too be donald than be donald or if u want too be douglas then.. be douglas tehehehe)

(REPLIESSS ARE REALLY REALLY APPRECIATING TEHEEE)🌹🌹🌹🌝🌝

PSST!!!! THIS IS FOR THE SPRINGFEVER JANITOR EVENTTT!!!!

🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌺🌺🌺🌺HAPPY SPRINGFEVER🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌹🌺🌺🌺🌺

Donald Says:

„Ye're a muckle nuisance! It's ta leave ye behind, I be wantin'!“
creator: ShigagoCLAW
